name: Leftover Turkey: Pumpkin Bean Turkey Chili
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 oz great northern beans, drained and washed
16 oz dark red kidney beans, drained and washed
2 1/2 cups turkey (light meat, skinless), cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onions, garlic, bell peppers, oregano, cumin, chili powder, salt, and black pepper. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in chicken broth, beans, tomatoes, pumpkin, turkey, and water.
4. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
5. Simmer for 45 minutes over low heat.
